title: Extra-Stemmed Wrapped British Garlicky Shaggy Quick-Fix Full Yorkshire Mashup
description: A satvik-friendly, full-english version of the classic Yorkshire mashup, incorporating garlicky flavor and wrapped in a corn-husk vessel for a satisfying meal. This recipe is a quick-fix, perfect for a busy day.

ingredients.name: Potatoes (2 kg)
ingredients.notes: Choose high-starch potatoes for a fluffier mashup.

ingredients.name: Garlic (4 cloves)
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic for a stronger flavor.

ingredients.name: Butter (60 g)
ingredients.notes: Use salted butter for added flavor.

ingredients.name: Milk (200 ml)
ingredients.notes: Whole milk is best for a richer mashup.

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Pepper enhances the flavor without adding extra calories.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use sea salt for a more subtle flavor.

ingredients.name: Bacon (120 g)
ingredients.notes: Choose thick-cut, smoked bacon for a more authentic flavor.

ingredients.name: Cheddar cheese (100 g)
ingredients.notes: Grate the cheese for an even distribution of flavor.

ingredients.name: Tabasco sauce
ingredients.notes: Add a dash of heat without overpowering the dish.

ingredients.name: Chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Use parsley as a garnish for added freshness.

ingredients.name: Corn husks (6)
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh corn husks for a more authentic vessel.

instructions: Peel the potatoes and chop them into large chunks. Rinse the potatoes and pat them dry with a clean cloth.

Place the potatoes in a large pot and add enough cold water to cover them. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork.
Drain the potatoes and return them to the pot. Add the butter, milk, black pepper, and salt, and mash the potatoes with a potato masher until they're smooth and creamy.
While the potatoes are cooking, cook the bacon in a pan over medium heat until it's crispy. Remove the bacon from the pan and chop it into small pieces.
Add the grated cheese to the pan and stir until it's melted and smooth. Remove the pan from the heat and set it aside.
Add the minced garlic to the potatoes and mash until it's fully incorporated.
Add the cooked bacon and cheese mixture to the potatoes and mash until they're well combined.
Spoon the potato mixture into the corn husks, dividing it evenly among the 6 husks.

Place the corn husks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake them in a preheated oven at 180°C (350°F) for 10-15 minutes, or until the potatoes are heated through and the cheese is melted and bubbly.

Remove the corn husks from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes. Serve the Extra-Stemmed Wrapped British Garlicky Shaggy Quick-Fix Full Yorkshire Mashup hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
